properties.body: NAVAREA XX 99/26 BARENTS SEA EAST OF RYBACHIY PENINSULA. CHART RUS 10100. 1. MISSILE FIRINGS 0500 TO 1700 UTC DAILY 11 TO 13 JUL NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 70-07.0N 035-56.0E, 69-27.5N 036-07.0E, 69-29.0N 035-11.0E, 69-32.0N 033-41.5E, 69-41.0N 033-04.0E, THEN COASTAL LINE TO 69-44.0N 033-04.0E, 70-03.0N 035-02.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 131800 UTC JUL 26.= NNNN
